name: Fragment of Inertia
descs:
Activates when using E.G.O Skills that apply [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor'.

Gain Final Power equal to (Sloth E.G.O resource + sum of other E.G.O resources/3) consumed and deal +50% damage

Sloth E.G.O Skills: Inflict additional [Vibration] Count Before Attack(ZAYIN inflicts +2 Count, TETH inflicts +3 Count, HE inflicts +4 Count, and so on), and deal +([Vibration] Potency on target x 1.5)% damage
